title: Project Manager Organization im Bereich Transformation & Strategy (m|w|d)
required_skills: Degree in business / STEM (Wirtschaftswissenschaften oder MINT)
Expertise in strategy, organizational development and/or transformation
4+ years leading large and complex projects for asset managers or financial services firms
Understanding of organizational structures and transformation processes
matched_skills: Digital transformation programme experience at HSBC (USD 8M programme, 6 workstreams)
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination including senior management and C-suite
Strong analytical and data storytelling skills
Student consulting project (VfB Stuttgart — strategic analysis and recommendations)
missing_skills: German language at C1 level (candidate is B1)
4+ years of leading large-scale projects independently (candidate has ~1 year PMO coordination at HSBC)
Formal organizational design / operating model consulting experience
Experience shaping organizational structures across business units
core_responsibilities: Lead complex, MEAG-wide organization and optimization projects from ideation through implementation
Provide strategic consulting on organizational structures and operating models; produce high-quality recommendations
Drive organizational development and process optimization aligned with technical evolution across and within business units
Build PM know-how across the firm through trainings and project setup coaching
Collaborate closely with the Strategy team, Senior Management, and cross-functional stakeholders
recommended_emphasis: Highlight the HSBC USD 8M digital transformation programme as proof of transformation and financial services PM experience
Emphasize cross-functional coordination across 6 workstreams and C-suite stakeholder management at HSBC
Frame the VfB Stuttgart student consulting project as organizational advisory and strategic recommendation work
Showcase analytical and structured reporting skills (budget dashboards, KPI frameworks, executive narratives)
Demonstrate agile project leadership (Scrum ceremonies, sprint planning, dependency management at Hapag-Lloyd)
Position German language as actively improving (B1 → ongoing) and stress business-fluent English as primary working language
Highlight MS Office and Power BI as evidence of strong tooling for executive-level reporting
